untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'price momentum over past 20 days in bottom 10th percentile' which requires cross-sectional percentile ranking across all stocks. This is a portfolio-level statistical calculation not expressible as a single-stock indicator. Similarly, 'volume below 30th percentile of its 60-day average' requires statistical percentile binning. Only translated the directional price decline (-15%) and approximate volume weakness using vol_ratio_20. Entry requires custom percentile calculation engine.
translation_notes: Partially translated using available indicators: (1) Price decline approximated with returns < -15% over lookback period; (2) Volume weakness approximated with vol_ratio_20 < 0.30 as proxy for below-average volume; (3) Price recovery exit set at returns > 8%; (4) Hold period set to 5 days per exit conditions. Missing: cross-sectional momentum percentile ranking and rolling percentile volume calculation. Recommend implementing custom percentile_rank() function for full signal fidelity.
